title: epic mod
description: a mod that adds whatever i feel like adding
body:
my first fabric mod wow!
# what is this
epic mod
# what does it add
current list of additions:
- suspicious substance: edible, compostable, furnace fuel
- funy stick: haha funy stick go knockback brrrrr
- epic block: does nothing, requires iron pickaxe to mine
- splungy ore: being developed
- crispy fries: find out
# dependencies
minecraft 1.21.5 and fabric api
# why does <x> not have a texture
we're still in beta sorry
# credits
Song: JPB - High [NCS Release]
Music provided by NoCopyrightSounds
Free Download/Stream: http://ncs.io/jpbhigh
